_comment: Cache Disabled Configuration - No caching for real-time or testing scenarios
description: Configuration with all caching disabled for real-time applications or testing

development.description: Disable cache during development to see immediate changes
development.recommendation: Use for testing, enable for production

real_time.description: Applications requiring current data (news, stocks, weather)
real_time.recommendation: Disable cache or use very short TTL (< 60s)

from_full_cache.step_4: Selectively re-enable cache for expensive operations

performance_considerations.cost_increase: API costs will increase proportionally to cache hit rate
performance_considerations.throughput_decrease: Lower throughput due to API rate limits
mitigation_strategies: Use faster models for non-cached operations
Consider selective caching for expensive operations

override_for_tests.description: Cache all test responses to avoid hitting real APIs

notes: This configuration disables all caching globally
Use workflow/agent overrides to selectively enable caching
Monitor costs and performance when running without cache
Consider hybrid approach: disable for some workflows, enable for others
